description: Electional (Western) or Muhurta (Jyotish) chart. Records a chosen auspicious moment for initiating an action. electionalDatetime is the elected moment — required.

record.description: Chart for an elected or muhurta moment — a deliberately chosen auspicious time for starting an action. The chart records the moment selected, not when the selection was made.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Breaking changes bump to 2.0.0 in a new lexicon file.

electionalDatetime.description: The elected moment — the chosen auspicious start time (ISO 8601). Required.

purpose.description: What the elected moment is for, e.g. 'Wedding ceremony', 'Business launch', 'Surgery', 'Property signing'.

beneficiaryDid.description: Optional DID of the person for whom the election was made. Set only with their consent.

place.description: Location for which the moment was elected.

electionNotes.description: Optional notes on the election rationale — why this moment was chosen, what factors were prioritized.

western.description: Western tropical astrological data for the elected moment. See space.chartid.defs#westernData.

jyotish.description: Jyotish/Muhurta data for the elected moment. See space.chartid.defs#jyotishData.

extensions.description: Top-level extension point for fields not yet in spec.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this record was created (ISO 8601).
